reasoning: While programmatic signals show high text preservation (96.6% recall), the structural and visual fidelity scores identify significant rendering defects that the basic text-matching algorithms missed. The relocation of the primary NCGICC header logo to the end of the document and the flattening of aligned committee lists into unstructured text blocks within the table represent substantial failures in accessibility and data presentation.

concerns.analysis: The reading order in the output deviates significantly from the source document. In the source PDF, the NCGICC logo is the very first element at the top of the page. In the output JSON, the logo (type: image) is assigned a reading_order of 9 and is placed at the end of the document after the website URL. This reorders a primary brand/header element to the footer of the reading sequence.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The NCGICC logo (globe icon over map of North Carolina) is positioned at the top center of the page, preceding the title.
concerns.output_quote: The image element for the logo appears as the final element in the array with 'reading_order': 9.

concerns.analysis: The rendering of Row 5 in the Agenda table is visually misrendered. In the source PDF, this row contains two horizontally aligned lists: one for Committee names and one for the corresponding Members. This layout clearly maps each member to their respective committee. In the HTML output, these lists are flattened into single blocks of text within their respective cells. concerns.source_pdf_quote: Row 5: Item 5 (Committee Reports) shows a vertical list of 6 committees (Statewide Mapping Advisory, Local Government, etc.) aligned line-by-line with a vertical list of 6 names (Paul Badr, Debbie Brannan, etc.) in the 'GICC MEMBER or GUEST' column.
concerns.output_quote: Row 5: The 'AGENDA ITEM' cell contains a single paragraph '5. Committee Reports • Statewide Mapping Advisory • Local Government • Federal Interagency • Technical Advisory • State Government GIS Users • Management & Operations'. The 'GICC MEMBER or GUEST' cell contains a single text string 'Paul Badr Debbie Brannan Scott Lokken Dean Grantham John Farley Alex Rankin' with no line breaks or separators.

action_items: Correct the reading order to place the logo/header at the beginning of the HTML sequence.
Reconstruct the list structure in the Agenda table to ensure committees and members are properly aligned and not concatenated into flat strings.
